# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-flask-api
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-flask-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-flask-api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flask-api
        image: your-registry/python-flask-api:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /
            port: 5000
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /
            port: 5000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: python-flask-api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: python-flask-api
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 5000
  type: LoadBalancer
